notes: THE HANGED MAN's six-face arcana die. Rolled on Threshold Rolls during a Hanged Man run. The faces lean toward stillness as a positive value — STILL is the highest success — and toward flinching as the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The room holds. You held the room. Advance two toward your declared act.
Success ★. You let it be true. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The boot turns once on its laces. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or stay (+1 SUSPENSION).
Partial. The static makes the face shape again. Spend 2 Action cards to convert to ★, or stay (+1 SUSPENSION).
Failure. You moved away from the thing instead of with it. +1 SUSPENSION.
Wild. ★ if you have SAT STILL this turn — the room counts that as the gesture. Otherwise: failure, and the chair on the floor moves a half-inch you can almost see.
